prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford 302 Windsor V8 (engine code: 5.0L 302CID) with a forged rotating assembly from Manley Performance (forged crankshaft, H-beam connecting rods, and forged pistons) paired with a custom camshaft grind from Comp Cams (280/288 duration, 0.550/0.555 lift, 110 LSA) for high-RPM power delivery (7,000+ RPM redline).

Forced induction via a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (86mm compressor wheel, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers (5.5" thick core, 1,200 CFM airflow) and a TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate to manage boost at 18 PSI.

Fuel system upgrade featuring a Holley Dominator EFI system with dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000 fuel injectors (2,000cc/min), and a custom fuel rail from Radium Engineering to support 800+ HP on E85 fuel.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the RWB Porsche-style fender flares from Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Mangusta-specific kit) with custom front and rear bumpers designed by Prior Design (PD-MAN01) for aggressive aerodynamics.
Custom 3-piece OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (9.5x18 front, 12x18 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/18 front, 335/30/18 rear) for maximum grip and staggered fitment.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara upholstery), a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (Mangusta-specific bolt-in design), and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub for track use.
